purpose: Epigenetic / NAD+ drive; may increase methyl demand (methyl-drain risk).
prerequisites_gates: NOT Phase 1. Use only after stable baseline ≥14 days; sleep stable; no acute stressor; stop other experimental changes.
monitoring: Homocysteine; sleep quality; anxiety/irritability; HR/resting pulse; digestion.
notes_stop_rules: Stop/reduce if insomnia, agitation, palpitations, marked anxiety, or GI crash.

purpose: Buffers methyl demand; supports homocysteine recycling; may improve tolerance of NAD+ pushes.
prerequisites_gates: Introduce before or alongside NMN push; start low if methyl-sensitive.
notes_stop_rules: If overstimulated or 'wired', reduce dose; ensure adequate B2/B6/folate/B12 from food.

purpose: Phytoestrogenic lever in reset hypothesis (AR resensitization via counter-regulation).
prerequisites_gates: Avoid if prior estrogen sensitivity or high prolactin/gynecomastia history; do not combine with other hormone-active agents.
monitoring: Estrogenic side effects (water retention, nipple sensitivity); mood; libido; prolactin/estradiol if available.
notes_stop_rules: Stop immediately if gynecomastia/nipple pain, emotional volatility, or libido collapse.

purpose: Maintain terrain stability while testing reset levers.
prerequisites_gates: Do not stack multiple new agents at once; one change every 5–7 days.
monitoring: CRP-hs; liver enzymes if adding new agents; subjective stability.
notes_stop_rules: If stability deteriorates, revert to mainline and re-stabilize ≥7 days before retry.

track_component: Governance: RESET track is OPTIONAL and higher-volatility. Keep it separate from Phase 1 / mainline. Prefer: baseline labs → single-variable change → track → decide.
